name: GOLFTEC Spokane
address: 1207 N Washington St Suite 2, Spokane, WA 99201
about: GOLFTEC Spokane is a high-tech golf training facility that provides data-driven instruction through advanced motion analysis technology. The facility utilizes OPTIMOTION systems, high-speed video, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback, forming the foundation for personalized game improvement plans. While the specific number of bays is not mentioned, the company operates a large network of centers equipped with this technology. Lessons are bookable online and can be purchased in various packages, with the option for a one-time pause on plans for up to 60 days. A certified club fitting service is also available, using launch monitors to match players with clubs from top brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provide detailed, objective swing data
Certified PGA coaches create personalized improvement plans based on the data analysis
Club fitting service uses technology to add an average of 21 more yards off the tee

food_and_drink.notes: No food service is mentioned on the website.
No alcohol service is mentioned on the website.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides clubs for lessons and fittings. For club fittings, they will use various club models from top brands to find the perfect fit for you.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services at the facility, so it appears you would need to consume any food or drink you bring outside of the lesson or fitting space.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time for 18 holes, as it focuses on lessons and practice sessions rather than full simulator play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC provides instruction and technology suitable for juniors and youth, and the website mentions specific junior coaching options.
